product: Salesforce Marketing Cloud managed ingestion connector (Beta)
tagline: The Salesforce Marketing Cloud connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: The Salesforce Marketing Cloud connector in Lakeflow Connect is now available in Beta. The connector allows you to ingest marketing data, including campaigns, journeys, email engagement events, and data extensions, from Salesforce Marketing Cloud into Databricks. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
